evidence.snippet: Northwest UAV | Aviation-grade American-made UAV Propulsion Systems

#### NW-230 HF UAV Engine
Designed with emphasis on low maintenance & high endurance unmanned aircraft in the 90-160 kg weight class.

#### NW-88 HF UAV Engine
Purpose-built for unmanned systems with larger payload requirements scalable for aircraft in the 34-68 kg weight class.

#### NW-44 HF UAV Engine
One of the most configurable engines on the market today scalable for unmanned aircraft in the 18-34 kg weight class.

items.notes: Core business: UAV heavy-fuel engines (NW-44, NW-88, NW-230) plus H2 PEM fuel cell

evidence.snippet:
Hydrogen for clean reliable energy. NWUAV's Proton Exchange Membrane (PEM) fuel cell for unmanned propulsion systems.
![Northwest UAV | NWFC-1500 Hydrogen Fuel Cell Propulsion](images/nwuav-global_logo.svg)

#### Generator (frameless/brushless) Features
![Northwest UAV | NW-230 HF UAV Engine](images/products/uav-component-generator_200px.png)NWUAV’s frameless brushless generator is designed to fit directly into your application, using the system mechanics to hold it. The generator is designed to be highly efficient, with high-grade magnets and materials in a compact design.

#### 280-Watt Generator Control Unit (GCU) Features
![Northwest UAV | NW-230 HF UAV Engine](images/products/uav-component-280-watt-generator-control-unit_200px.png)Mix and match your system's voltage and power requirements with the NWUAV GCU. The GCU manages the variable voltage and frequency inputs and outputs stable DC power. Designed to fit the needs of most Small Unmanned Aerial Vehicles.

items.notes: NWFC-1500 PEM hydrogen fuel cell, frameless brushless generator, 280-W GCU

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures UAV propulsion subsystems (engines, fuel cells, ECU, FDS, generators) sold to UAV OEMs such as Elbit Systems. Also distributes Silvus radios, Veronte autopilots, Pegasus actuators.

#### Veronte Autopilots, Avionics, Simulation Software, and Accessories
###### Northwest UAV is an authorized United States distributor for Veronte
America’s trusted leader in American-made, AS9100-compliant UAV propulsion and integrated solutions, Northwest UAV continues to engineer the future of unmanned propulsion systems.

ndaa.notes: Site repeatedly claims 'American-made' and AS9100-compliant but never mentions NDAA Section 848 or 889 compliance specifically.

evidence.snippet: Build-To-Print or COTS, full-service production, CNC/CMS machine shop, electrical & wiring shop, A&P mechanics, and ERP product lifecycle management.

The NW-44 is built for endurance and reliability. Depending on configuration and options, this engine runs at 3.5 horsepower with an 43.6 cc displacement, weighing 3402 grams ± 100 grams. Approved for EAR99.

readiness.notes: NW-44 has logged 28,000+ operational hours; NW-88 and NW-230 also in production. AS9100D/ISO9001 certified facility with full-service manufacturing (CNC, wiring, A&P mechanics). Products have EAR99 export approval.

tagline: Manufactures aviation-grade heavy-fuel and multi-fuel UAV engines (NW-44, NW-88, NW-230) spanning 18–160 kg aircraft, plus fuel cells, engine control units, and power distribution subsystems. AS9100D certified. NDAA and Blue UAS status not disclosed. Distributes Veronte autopilots, Pegasus actuators, and Silvus MANET radios. Public evidence supports production-ready propulsion hardware; gaps remain on government contract wins and supply-chain compliance certifications.
